output.summary: Successfully implemented all changes for the Tabs block: (1) Added accessibility fixes - aria-label on tablist and aria-controls/tabpanel attributes in server-rendered HTML, (2) Added per-tab color feature with tabColor attribute on TabsItem and tabsColor sync array on Tabs, (3) Updated JavaScript to toggle color classes on panels container, (4) Rebuilt test page with 9 comprehensive variations including edge cases and per-tab color demonstrations.

filesModified.purpose: Added tabsColor array attribute and providesContext for baseId
Added tabColor attribute and usesContext for baseId
Added tabsColor sync, aria-label on tablist, and color class application to tab buttons
Added color picker control in InspectorControls and applied color class to details element
Added aria-label on tablist, aria-controls on tab buttons, data-tab-color attribute, and color class application
Added id, role='tabpanel', aria-labelledby, and tabindex to content div; applied color class to details element
Updated selectTab function to toggle color classes on panels container based on active tab's color

attributesAdded.name: tabColor
attributesAdded.description: Color override for this tab. Valid values: '', 'neon-green', 'blue', 'green', 'yellow', 'orange', 'purple'

attributesAdded.name: tabsColor
attributesAdded.description: Array of tab color values synced from child tabColor attributes

accessibilityFixes.fix: Added aria-label to tablist div in both Tabs.tsx and Tabs.php using heading value (fallback to 'Tabs')

Added aria-controls on tab buttons in Tabs.php, and added id, role='tabpanel', aria-labelledby, tabindex='0' on content panels in TabsItem.php. ARIA attributes now present in server-rendered HTML before JS enhancement.

perTabColorFeature.implementation: Added tabColor attribute to TabsItem allowing per-tab color selection. Color classes are applied to tab buttons in desktop tablist and to details elements on mobile. JavaScript toggles the active tab's color class on the panels container to affect panel background.
perTabColorFeature.frontendBehavior: Color class wrapper overrides --accent-color CSS custom properties affecting bg-accent and bg-accent-lighter utilities

warnings: webpack performance warnings (asset size limits) - these are expected and not blocking
eslint warning about exhaustive-deps in Tabs.tsx - acceptable as the pattern intentionally limits dependencies to avoid infinite loops

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structures are in sync. All conditional classes and ARIA attributes match between editor and frontend.

variations: Default / Minimal - Only required fields populated
Full Content - All fields populated with eyebrow, description, buttons, tab descriptions
Empty Optional Fields - No eyebrow, description, buttons, or tab descriptions
Long Content - Very long heading, description, and tab titles
Many Tabs (8 items) - Edge case with 8 tab items
Single Tab - Edge case with only 1 tab item
Per-Tab Colors - Mixed individual colors (default, blue, orange, purple)
All Tabs With Descriptions - Every tab has a description
Per-Tab Colors with Mixed Content - Individual colors with varied content lengths

notes: The TabsItem.php uses a static counter to track tab index for generating matching IDs. This works because tabs are rendered sequentially.
The JavaScript is idempotent - it can safely run even when ARIA attributes are already present from PHP.
Color class toggling happens in JS selectTab function which removes all color classes from panels container then applies the active tab's color.
The lint warning about exhaustive-deps in Tabs.tsx is expected - the useEffect intentionally limits dependencies to derived arrays to prevent infinite loops while syncing child attributes.
